summary: Tested removal of Auszahlung page and addition of IBAN to contract signing flow. All features working correctly. Auszahlung removed from sidebar and routes. IBAN field present in contract signing modal with validation. PDF download works for signed contracts.

console_warnings.issue: Console logs: 'No routes matched location /mitarbeiter/auszahlung' - This is expected behavior as route was removed

critical_code_review_comments: Auszahlung page successfully removed from sidebar menu items (line 69-75 MitarbeiterLayout.jsx)
Auszahlung route successfully removed from App.js - no route for /mitarbeiter/auszahlung
IBAN input field added to contract signing modal with data-testid='iban-input'
IBAN validation works correctly - rejects IBANs < 15 or > 34 characters
IBAN is stored in database upon contract signing
IBAN is included in generated PDF under §4 Bankverbindung
PDF download works correctly with proper content-type and filename
seed_data_creation: Used existing contracts. Both contracts now signed with IBAN DE89370400440532013000 and DE89370400440532013001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auszahlung page has been removed from employee panel. Contract signing now requires IBAN input. Two contracts exist for test employee (both now signed). Test new contract creation flow if needed.
